Clipping.title: Clipping
Clipping.description: A single news item from the Belgian clipping.

date.description: The date the news was published (YYYY-MM-DD).

title.description: The translated title of the news.

leed.description: The LEED (Who, What, Where, When, Why).

body.description: The summary of the news in 1945 orthography.

link.description: The original URL of the source.

source.description: The name of the newspaper (e.g., Le Soir).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the clipping was generated.
